name: The Pythonic Depths

enemies.name: IndentationError
enemies.description: One wrong space and everything falls apart.

enemies.name: TypeError
enemies.description: Expected int, got str. Expected str, got NoneType.

enemies.name: Circular Import
enemies.description: A imports B imports C imports A imports B imports...

enemies.name: GIL Monster
enemies.description: Only one thread shall pass. The rest must wait.

enemies.name: from * import *
enemies.description: Imports everything. Including the kitchen sink. And the kitchen.

enemies.name: Global Variable
enemies.description: Everywhere at once. Mutated by everything. Trusted by no one.

bosses.name: The Anti-Zen
bosses.description: Beautiful is ugly. Explicit is implicit. Simple is complex.

bosses.name: The Metaclass
bosses.description: A class that creates classes that create classes. Nobody understands it. Not even itself.

traps.name: Mixed Tabs & Spaces
traps.description: The ground shifts between tabs and spaces beneath your feet!

traps.name: Python 2 Artifact
traps.description: print 'DAMAGE' — wait, that's not a function!

traps.name: Wrong Virtualenv
traps.description: You activated the wrong virtualenv. Nothing works.

empty: Jupyter notebooks litter the floor, outputs still running.
A pip install is frozen mid-download.
A requirements.txt longer than the actual code.
The walls are lined with decorators, stacked impossibly high.
rest: A conda environment that actually works. Rest here.
A clean virtualenv with all dependencies installed.
A cozy IPython session with tab completion.
treasure: A well-documented module with type hints!
A perfectly formatted f-string reveals hidden loot.

floor_flavor: The air smells of whitespace and broken dreams...
Indentation errors echo through the corridors.
A faint 'import antigravity' is whispered from the walls.
The Zen of Python is inscribed on the ceiling. Someone crossed half of it out.
boss_clues: PEP violations are scrawled on every surface...
You find a crumpled list comprehension three screens wide.
The type hints here contradict each other violently.
